nasb.text: But these three men, Shadrach, Meshach and Abed-nego, fell into the midst of the furnace of blazing fire still tied up.

esv.text: And these three men, Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego, fell bound into the burning fiery furnace.

cnv.text: 而沙得拉、米煞和亞伯尼歌這三個人仍被綁著，落入烈火的窯中。

ccb.text: 沙得拉、米煞、亚伯尼歌三人被绑着落入烈焰熊熊的火窑。
